requirement_topic.en: PNEE Energy Efficiency Label Direction for Air-conditioners and Heat Pumps
requirement_topic.zh: PNEE空调与热泵能效标签方向
requirement_topic.zht: PNEE空調與熱泵能效標籤方向

summary.en: ANRE publishes efficiency and labeling direction under the National Energy Efficiency Program (PNEE). Import products including room AC and heat pumps should follow Moroccan energy documentation expectations, including declared efficiency indicators and category language alignment for import declarations and sales channels.
summary.zh: ANRE在国家能源效率计划（PNEE）下发布能效和标签方向。包括房间空调与热泵的进口产品应遵循摩洛哥能效文件要求，涵盖效率指标声明以及进口申报与销售渠道对应的语言和展示方式。
summary.zht: ANRE在國家能源效率計劃（PNEE）下發布能效和標籤方向。包括房間空調與熱泵的進口產品應遵循摩洛哥能效文件要求，涵蓋效率指標聲明以及進口申報與銷售渠道對應的語言和展示方式。

summary.en: China uses China Energy Label and GB 21455-related declarations for room AC performance claims. These are domestic baselines and do not automatically satisfy Morocco-specific PNEE labeling logic.
summary.zh: 中国通过中国能效标识及 GB 21455 等规定进行房间空调能效声明，这些是国内基准，不自动满足摩洛哥 PNEE 的标签逻辑。
summary.zht: 中國透過中國能效標識及 GB 21455 等規定進行房間空調能效聲明，這些是國內基準，不自動滿足摩洛哥 PNEE 的標籤邏輯。

gap.en: Efficiency labels and class descriptors in Chinese declarations cannot be directly reused for Moroccan sales documentation. Product class, efficiency metric definition, and declaration format may need conversion and local language adjustment.
gap.zh: 中文能效标签及等级描述不能直接作为摩洛哥销售文件使用。产品分类、效率指标口径和声明格式通常需要转换并本地化语言。
gap.zht: 中文能效標籤及等級描述不能直接作為摩洛哥銷售文件使用。產品分類、效率指標口徑和聲明格式通常需要轉換並本地化語言。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for relevant imported appliances under ANRE energy-efficiency direction
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in CN domestic context under Chinese energy label regime

source.publisher: ANRE (Authority for Electricity and Energy Regulation), Morocco

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap — Chinese energy labels are a baseline only; ANRE/PNEE-compliant Moroccan energy documentation and local label expectations should be confirmed before placement on market.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在差距——中国能效标识仅作起点，需在入市前确认符合ANRE/PNEE的摩洛哥能效文件和标签要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在差距——中國能效標識僅作起點，需在入市前確認符合 ANRE/PNEE 的摩洛哥能效文件和標籤要求。

requirement_topic.en: 2026 Electrical Product Climate and Efficiency Context
requirement_topic.zh: 2026年电气产品能效与气候适配
requirement_topic.zht: 2026年電氣產品能效與氣候適配

summary.en: Market-ready split AC and heat-pump products should remain aligned with Moroccan grid characteristics (400/230 V and 50 Hz operation) and related installation practice expectations under energy and utility oversight. Importers should confirm utility-side notices for seasonal rating references and declaration format.
summary.zh: 适销性的分体空调和热泵产品应与摩洛哥电网特征（400/230伏、50赫兹）以及能源/电力监管部门的安装实践要求保持一致，并确认季节性能指标和申报表述方式。
summary.zht: 適銷性的分體空調和熱泵產品應與摩洛哥電網特徵（400/230伏、50赫茲）以及能源／電力監管部門的安裝實踐要求保持一致，並確認季節性能指標和申報表述方式。

standards_or_laws: ONEE electricity and grid application guidance

summary.en: Chinese standards such as GB/T 7725 and GB 25454 provide COP/SCOP and heat-pump performance methods, but grid and market-declaration context differs in Morocco. China 220 V is close but not fully identical to Morocco's 230 V household reference.
summary.zh: 中国 GB/T 7725 和 GB 25454 提供 COP/SCOP 方法，但摩洛哥在电网电压与市场申报上下文不同。中国常见 220 伏与摩洛哥 230 伏并不完全一致。
summary.zht: 中國 GB/T 7725 與 GB 25454 提供 COP/SCOP 方法，但摩洛哥在電網電壓與市場申報上下文不同。中國常見 220 伏與摩洛哥 230 伏並不完全一致。

gap.en: Chinese efficiency documentation is helpful for technical comparison but typically does not map automatically to Moroccan utility-facing declarations and grid-assumption disclosures.
gap.zh: 中国能效文档可用于技术比较，但通常不能自动映射为摩洛哥电力公用事业侧的申报、标签或电网工况披露要求。
gap.zht: 中國能效文件可用於技術比較，但通常不能自動映射為摩洛哥電力公用事業側的申報、標籤或電網工況揭露要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where importer program and market-entry paperwork demand Moroccan utility-aligned documentation
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for Chinese domestic compliance but not sufficient for Morocco

source.publisher: ONEE (Office National de l'Electricité et de l'Eau Potable), Morocco

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap remains unless efficiency labeling, metric references, and utility-facing declarations are prepared for Morocco utility and ANRE expectations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在未按摩洛哥效能指标与ONEE/ANRE要求准备标签和申报文件前，仍存在差距。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在未按摩洛哥效能指標與ONEE/ANRE要求準備標籤和申報文件前，仍存在差距。
